name: row-banding-alternation
description: Table with band1Horz (light blue DAEEF3), band2Horz (light yellow FFFFCC). 6 rows, horizontal banding enabled, no firstRow/lastRow/col conditionals.
expected_behavior: Row 0: blue (DAEEF3, band1Horz). Row 1: yellow (FFFFCC, band2Horz). Row 2: blue. Row 3: yellow. Row 4: blue. Row 5: yellow. Banding cycles every 2 rows.
